en: Normal target decals no longer leave trails when dragged
UV wireframe shows the full mesh right after plugin reload — no need to reopen the 3D editor
Path diagnostics opens in a resizable standalone window
Added Full Redraw toolbar button to recover when previews get stuck
Support for body mods with non-standard texture names (Bibo+ etc.)
Skin body materials no longer show the Mask option since it has no effect there
Changelog tab and multi-select copy in the debug log
zh: Normal 目标贴花拖动时不再有残影
插件重载后 UV 网格立即完整显示，无需重新打开 3D 编辑器
路径诊断改为独立可调整大小的窗口
工具栏新增完全重绘按钮，预览卡住时一键恢复
支持非标命名的身体 mod (Bibo+ 等)
skin 身体材质不再显示 Mask 选项 (该材质上没效果)
新增更新日志 Tab 和调试日志多选复制

en: Per-layer target map: decals can independently paint Diffuse, Mask, or Normal textures
Normal / Mask layers preserve normal.alpha so the emissive and ColorTable row-index systems still work
Auto-detect normal maps on image load: filename hint (_n / _norm / normal) or blue-dominant RGB
Non-Diffuse target layers hide the Show Decal / Emissive / PBR controls for a cleaner parameter panel
zh: 按图层选择目标贴图：贴花可独立画到 Diffuse / Mask / Normal 三张贴图
Normal / Mask 图层不写 normal.alpha，保留给发光与 ColorTable 行号系统
加载图片时自动识别法线贴图：文件名含 _n / _norm / normal，或 RGB 蓝色主导即命中
非 Diffuse 目标下自动隐藏显示贴花/发光/PBR 选项，参数面板更简洁

en: Emissive ripple animation with directional modes and dual-color support
Emissive gradient animation: smooth transition between two colors
Iris pulse animation with per-frame CBuffer modulation, flicker animation, fix for hidden layers breaking in-place swap
zh: 发光水波纹动画，支持方向模式与双色
发光双色渐变动画：在两种颜色之间平滑过渡
虹膜脉冲实时调制、闪烁动画，修复隐藏图层导致 in-place 失效

en: Per-layer emissive pulse animation with independent parameters
Cross-group visibility toggle + emissive layer feathering preserved across redraws
Iris mask compositing: patched emissive mask for vanilla eyes missing red-channel glow source
zh: 贴花发光脉冲动画，每层参数独立
跨组可见性切换，羽化+发光贴花状态在重绘间保留
虹膜 mask 合成：为红通道为空的原版眼睛自动生成发光遮罩

en: Initial release: real-time decal compositing on FFXIV skin textures via Penumbra temporary mods
UV canvas editor + 3D model preview with ray-picking decal placement
Per-layer blend modes, clip modes, UV transform, falloff masks
.pmp mod export for sharing with other users
zh: 首个版本：通过 Penumbra 临时 mod 在 FFXIV 皮肤贴图上实时合成贴花
UV 画布编辑器 + 3D 模型预览，支持射线点击放置贴花
按图层设置混合模式、裁剪、UV 变换、羽化遮罩
.pmp mod 导出，可分享给其他玩家
